{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220707546AFCCB04CA87378C288A"}"},"total":14},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7610381446680740632","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"写的不错，值得一看，作者加油！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1771932563,"group_id":"7595868931529640984","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9pNFTMesTCF+CdgzOEUr3o=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/921fc30891584011ac0f00d9c014d52f~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776704348&x-signature=awhvfF9cJHgqeh165MHq9Jpp9v8%3D","user_id":"95917407551","user_name":"依月笑红尘"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"95917407551","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7595868931529640984","book_info":{"abstract":"       【评分刚出，后面会涨~】顶级工程师林卫东重生1959，开局就是轧钢厂的烂摊子。
　　看着那台困死无数老师傅的苏制镗床，林卫东笑了。
　　前世为了生活唯唯诺诺，这一世靠着【工业大师系统】，他要活得肆意张扬！
　　别人视为天书的残缺图纸，他一眼看透；
　　别人造不出的精密齿轮，他徒手打磨！
　　一个月晋升工程师，分房涨薪娶媳妇，这仅仅是开始。
　　在这个激情燃烧的岁月里，林卫东偶尔搞搞小发明，顺便给这个野蛮生长的工业时代，立一点点规矩！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/6f56480531cf54f24b5c80f7d3f61e0d","author":"北风飞舟","author_id":"","book_id":"7595868931529640984","book_name":"疯了吧！我就修个机器，成国宝了","book_short_name":"五零：开局一个工业系统","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#282030","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.5万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":516,"name":"都市异能","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=516&name=都市异能&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7595872732949004824","read_count":"34187","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"389375"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.6","serial_count":"147","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,都市异能,穿越,系统,重生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o34d2ecb299359a05962c6fee91dfa852~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779318474&x-signature=4N7sOaDoUJ3mAADcjDdSRVVBsvY%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"441370492560281","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"26"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220707546AFCCB04CA87378C288A"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"dig
